desc: Static build-delta analysis of why RX bytes reached the FIFO in the TX-only reporter build but never entered it in the ticket-001 telemetry build (done/2026-07-14-t6040-dockchannel-rxirq-txpoll-result.md, matrix row 3): diff the probe/startup IRQ-block write sequences, RX_THRESH timing, and the dock-side KIS agent flow-control interaction with AP-side IRQ_MASK state; propose the next bounded diagnostic offline. No live retry of either completed image
